message:
[charmed_rust-o55n] Add property-based tests for bubbles components

- Added  dev-dependency to
- Implemented comprehensive invariant tests for:
  - Paginator (page bounds, slice validity)
  - Progress (percent clamping, view generation)
  - TextInput (cursor bounds, char limits)

files.patch:
@@ -20,6 +20,7 @@ parking_lot = "0.12"
 [dev-dependencies]
 criterion.workspace = true
 regex.workspace = true
+proptest.workspace = true
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "bubbles_benchmarks"
